+ Autensa — Agentic AI Assistant

A Chrome Extension that brings agentic AI capabilities directly into your browser workflow.

View on GitHub

Behind the Scenes

Built with AI

Every product in the AiSurgent ecosystem is designed, developed, and deployed using modern AI-assisted workflows — from ideation to production.

Next.js & React

Modern web apps with server-side rendering, optimized performance, and seamless deployment on Vercel.

Flutter & Mobile

Cross-platform mobile apps with native performance, beautiful UI, and shared business logic.

Chrome Extensions

Browser-native tools that integrate directly into your workflow with Manifest V3 and modern APIs.

AiSurgent

AI-powered products for professionals and DevOps teams. Built by Saikiran Bali with a passion for shipping high-quality software across every platform.
